summary: Confirm that a second isolated official-source OpenSCAD WebAssembly build produces byte-for-byte identical manifest, JavaScript, and WASM outputs.
specSections: Section 2.7/A-5 official-source engine build and checksums
V-3 golden geometry and engine pin

externalInputs.purpose: Download the second exact-SHA artifact and compare every retained file against the first verified source-build artifact.

decisions.decision: Retain the second isolated build identity in ENGINE_VERSION as reproducibility confirmation while keeping the first successful run as the canonical source-build artifact record.
decisions.rationale: The workflow-only trigger correction caused one final build from the same approved commit, image, toolchain, and flags. All three retained files are exactly identical in size and SHA-256, converting deterministic-build confidence from a recipe claim into observed two-run evidence without launching another cycle.

testEvidence.criterion: The pinned official-source build is byte-deterministic across two isolated hosted runners
testEvidence.test: Download both exact-run artifacts outside the repository, require identical file sets, and independently compare byte counts and SHA-256 for the manifest, JavaScript module, and WASM binary.

red.outcome: RED: one verified artifact established integrity but could not demonstrate cross-run byte determinism.

green.command: gh run download 29498231330; Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 and file-set/length comparison against scadmill-wasm-evidence-08514e7
green.outcome: GREEN: both directories contain the same three files. The 533-byte manifest, 100,027-byte openscad.js, and 10,760,714-byte openscad.wasm match byte-for-byte with identical SHA-256 values 225A99E4F2956839E23FAA0640F12C8BD17A90B04EC0A50904B91FFA886D759C, E458673D46D506D77B780C526D6E5492250F353D582057C6F912724A9586D86E, and 64124667A8E54EAF20324A0B1BF707FC5E338D7C92187BB411982FE5F69EF82F.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
